use_cases: Trigger form submissions with visual feedback across applications
Execute user actions like save, delete, or navigate with click interactions
Serve as primary call-to-action elements in marketing or product UIs
Toggle UI states such as modals, dropdowns, or sidebars
Provide accessible keyboard-navigable controls with focus indicators
ai_summary: A versatile button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Tailwind CSS, Radix UI Slot for composition, and class-variance-authority for type-safe variant handling. Supports hover states, disabled functionality, and focus-visible accessibility patterns.
